nasb.text: And he would have gladly filled his stomach with the pods that the swine were eating, and no one was giving anything to him.

esv.text: And he was longing to be fed with the pods that the pigs ate, and no one gave him anything.

cnv.text: 他恨不得吃豬所吃的豆莢，可是沒有人給他。

ccb.text: 他饿到恨不得拿喂猪的豆荚充饥，可是连这些也没有人给他。

csbs.text: 他就是渴望拿猪吃的豆荚来充饥，也没有人给他。
